description: Greater Chennai Corporation is the municipal government body for Chennai, India, providing civic administration, public services, payments, grievances, and geographic information services. Its web presence includes public-facing service portals and GIS/map data endpoints.
summary: chennaicorporation.gov.in exposes public HTTP integration surfaces including ArcGIS REST GIS endpoints and a public grievance JSON endpoint, and Chennai Corporation certificate data is also exposed through a separate API Setu OpenAPI-described HTTP API; no GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.

surfaces.name: Greater Chennai Corporation certificate API via API Setu
Greater Chennai Corporation GIS ArcGIS REST services
Greater Chennai Corporation public grievance API
